content.text: Summarize the change and include commit output in the index.

This assistant response is intentionally long so the index page can show a preview for assistant output. It should summarize the architecture, call out the file format changes, mention validation, and include follow-up steps for manual QA. This sentence is repeated to make the content long enough for truncation. This sentence is repeated to make the content long enough for truncation.
